cards.back: A Check Sum is a numeric value calculated from the data being sent, used for error detection

cards.front: What is the purpose of Check Sum?
cards.back: To detect errors in data transmission, ensuring data integrity and reliability
A protocol that establishes a connection between two devices, enabling data communication
By calculating a numeric value from the data, the sender compares it to the received value to detect errors

cards.front: What is the difference between Check Sum and Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC)?
cards.back: Check Sum is a simple error detection method, while CRC is a more complex method that also corrects errors
